events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the frame cuts off the area showing the fall-protection/energy exposure control, crew position relative to hazards can't be verified — I marked this `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than a pass/fail, and listed the immediate action of obtaining an unobstructed view/second angle and having a competent person verify boundaries in person before placement continues at full rate.
